nasb.text: For it flatters him in his own eyes Concerning the discovery of his iniquity and the hatred of it.

esv.text: For he flatters himself in his own eyes that his iniquity cannot be found out and hated.

cnv.text: 罪過媚惑他， 因此在他眼中看來， 自己的罪孽不會揭發，也不會被恨惡。

ccb.text: 他们自以为是，浑然不知自己的罪， 也不憎恶自己的罪。

csbs.text: 因为他在眼中自我谄媚， 以致他不能发现、更不能恨恶自己的罪孽。
